purpose: Recursive file-tree view rendered from state.ideFileTrees[workspaceId]. On workspace change/mount, fetches root via window.electronAPI.ideListDir(workspace.path) and dispatches IDE_SET_FILE_TREE. Polls the root every 10s to pick up external file additions/deletions. TreeNode children with type==='directory' lazy-load on first expand: when expandedPaths gains a path whose children===null, loadChildren() calls ideListDir(dirPath) and dispatches IDE_UPDATE_FILE_TREE_NODE. expandedPaths and loadingPaths are local Set state. File click dispatches IDE_OPEN_FILE with { path, name } payload. Header includes a Search button that dispatches { key:'ideSidebarView', value:'search' } (swapping in SearchPanel) and a Refresh button that resets expandedPaths and re-fetches. File-type icons resolved by extension via getFileIcon: JS/JSX/MJS/CJS, TS/TSX, CSS/SCSS/LESS, JSON, HTML, MD/MDX → distinct colored SVGs; default is GenericFileIcon.
gotchas: Two effects load the root: the mount/workspace-change effect AND a 10-second polling interval — both call ideListDir(workspace.path). On a slow filesystem this could cause overlapping fetches; the 10s poll silently swallows errors via try/catch.

Mount effect's dep array EXCLUDES `tree` (comment: '// removed `tree` dep — always refresh on mount') so a fresh fetch happens every time the component mounts even if cached tree exists. This is intentional but means switching to/from the search panel triggers a refetch.
expandedPaths is local Set state — collapsing/expanding does NOT persist across workspace switches or panel switches.
Lazy-load assumes `node.children === null` to indicate 'unloaded' — empty directories have children: [] and won't trigger a fetch (correct behavior, but worth noting).
data-depth is capped at Math.min(depth, 10) — deeply nested trees beyond 10 levels share the same indentation visually.
Refresh resets expandedPaths to empty then sets to {workspace.path} — all currently-expanded folders collapse on refresh.
Polling interval persists for the lifetime of the workspace selection — heavy on large workspaces.
patterns: Lazy directory loading: setLoadingPaths(prev → add) → ideListDir → dispatch IDE_UPDATE_FILE_TREE_NODE → setLoadingPaths(prev → delete).
TreeNode is RECURSIVE — renders itself for each child when expanded.
getFileIcon uses ext.toLowerCase() of last dot segment; multi-extension files like .test.js resolve as 'js'.
Sidebar view toggle via dispatch({ key:'ideSidebarView', value:'search'|'explorer' }) — IDEView swaps SearchPanel ↔ FileExplorer based on this.
conventions: Inline SVG icon components per file type (JsIcon, TypeScriptIcon, CssIcon, JsonIcon, HtmlIcon, MarkdownIcon, GenericFileIcon, FolderIcon, FolderOpenIcon).
All icons styled via CSS vars (--icon-folder, --icon-folder-bg, --icon-generic-bg).
CSS class 'ide-explorer-' prefix for all elements.
